name: Animating Drop Shadows - YouTube
snippet: Learn how to use the drop-shadow CSS filter to smoothly animate an element's drop-shadow.

name: Designing Beautiful Shadows in CSS • Josh W. Comeau
snippet: In this tutorial, we'll learn how to transform typical box-shadows into beautiful, life-like ones.

name: Use CSS filter to Create a Drop Shadow - Egghead.io
snippet: In this lesson, we look at how you can use the CSS filter property to create a drop shadow effect around an element's content.
